name: Seafood Egg Rolls
recipeIngredient: 1 cup finely chopped shrimp or lobster
recipeInstructions:
Combine the first six ingredients in a large bowl. Blend in the other ingredients and mix thoroughly. Drain.
Pour 1/4 cup of filling into the center of each egg roll skin. Fold two sides over the filling to enclose it completely.
Make a paste using flour and water; brush the edges with this mixture.
Roll up each egg roll, pressing the edges together to seal them. Place on wax paper.
Fry in deep hot fat (360 degrees) for about 5 minutes, turning only once. They should be crisp and golden brown.
Serve hot or freeze and reheat in a microwave or oven. Serve with apricot or hot mustard sauce. Makes 24 large egg rolls.
Apricot Sauce: In a saucepan, bring to a boil, then simmer, stirring occasionally for 2 minutes. Cool.
Hot Mustard Sauce: Make a paste of dry mustard and water.
